system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). parsed.body:
Hello Aurora Automotive Team,

Thank you for sending over PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001 against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We've booked the order and created SO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001 in our system.

Order summary:
- PO Number: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001
- Sales Order: SO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001
- Quote Reference: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- Net Total: $179,200.00
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Ship-To: Aurora Automotive — El Segundo Lab, Engineering Receiving

A Sales Order Acknowledgement (SOA) along with the Salesforce Order link will follow within the hour.

Regarding your questions on quantity revisions, please reply to this thread with the specific line items and revised quantities you'd like to review, and we'll coordinate with your account team to confirm pricing and availability.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
